document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report (FS) for the Whabouchi Project in North America dated 2018.pdf
document.description: A technical report providing a feasibility study of the Whabouchi Lithium Mine and Shawinigan Electrochemical Plant effective as of November 7th, 2017.
